data.body: Bug tickets require --reason with prefix 'Fixed:' or 'Escalated to user:' when transitioning to closed. Agents currently attempt bare transitions (ticket transition <id> in_progress closed) which fail silently. Fix: update CLAUDE.md ticket transition guidance, fix-bug SKILL.md Step 8, and end-session SKILL.md Step 2 to include the --reason flag with the required prefix. Also consider updating the error message from the ticket system to be more prominent.
